items.title: US PCE Inflation April 2026: Headline 3.8% YoY, Highest Since May 2023
items.content: Core PCE rose 0.24% MoM and 3.3% YoY, in line with forecasts. Headline PCE hit 3.8% YoY, driven partly by energy costs.

items.title: April PCE Data Confirms Sticky Inflation Pressures
items.content: The annual rate reached the highest level in over a year, reinforcing the Fed's cautious stance on rate cuts.

items.title: Dow Jones Closes at Record 52,016.57 – Second Consecutive Record
items.content: Gains driven by financial and industrial names (Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar, American Express). Nasdaq fell 1.15%, S&P 500 eased 0.55% ahead of Fed decision.

items.title: Tech and Semiconductor Sector Pullback Amid Fed Caution
items.content: Investors rotated out of tech ahead of the Fed decision. Fed maintained rates but showed increasing bias toward a potential rate hike later in 2026.

items.title: SpaceX Surges ~20% on $60B Acquisition of AI Startup Anysphere (Cursor)
items.content: The acquisition signals continued mega-deal activity in AI infrastructure space.

items.title: Hang Seng Index Falls to 23,924.81 – Lowest Since July 2025
items.content: Third consecutive session of decline (-1.59%). Factors: doubts over Iran peace process, hawkish Fed stance pressuring property sector, global rotation toward North Asia AI supply chain names.

items.title: Hong Kong 'Old Economy' Stocks Surge While Internet Names Sink
items.content: Techtronic Industries surged on buyback, OOCL benefited from rising container freight rates, Lenovo reported record revenue. Property developers recovered on easing mortgage rates.

items.source: HKLaw / Times of Israel / Al Jazeera
items.title: US and Iran Sign Interim MOU to End Strait of Hormuz Conflict
items.content: Agreement calls for immediate cessation of military operations, framework for sanctions relief, and reopening of maritime routes. Sets 60-day negotiation window.

items.title: Iran Announces Re-Closure of Strait of Hormuz, Citing Israeli Attacks in Lebanon
items.content: Iran accuses US of failing to uphold commitments under the MOU. US Central Command disputes Iran's claim, says traffic continues. Further talks scheduled in Switzerland.

items.title: China Exchanges Rebalance Indices to Favor Domestic AI and Semiconductor Companies
items.content: Major indices phasing out traditional consumer electronics for AI/chip sector names. Global semi market projected ~$1.511T in 2026 (+90% YoY). CXMT and YMTC preparing STAR Market IPOs.

items.title: Best Buy Q1 FY27 Beats Estimates: Revenue $8.94B (+1.9% YoY), Adj EPS $1.28 vs $1.23 Est
items.content: Company reiterated FY27 guidance of $6.30-$6.60 adj diluted EPS.

items.title: Snowflake Q1 FY27 Earnings Beat: EPS $0.39 vs $0.32 Est, Product Revenue +33.5% YoY to $1.39B
items.content: Product revenue exceeded consensus estimate of $1.32B. Continued strong cloud data platform demand.

items.title: Dollar Tree Q1 FY26 Beats: Adj EPS $1.74 vs $1.55 Est, Revenue $5.0B (+7.2% YoY)
items.content: Raised full-year fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to $6.70-$7.10.
